title: poikilospermum scortechinii
intro: Poikilospermum scortechinii, also known as the Polyspermum tree, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The medicinal properties of Poikilospermum scortechinii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Poikilospermum scortechinii is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
